# Agent Skill Exchange

Agent Skill Exchange is a public catalog of reusable AI agent skills. Each skill wraps a real upstream tool, repository, package, API, or workflow into instructions agents can install and use.

## Canonical machine-readable files

- Full catalog JSON: https://agentskillexchange.com/skills.json
- OpenClaw manifest: https://agentskillexchange.com/openclaw.json
- Codex manifest: https://agentskillexchange.com/codex.json
- GitHub repository: https://github.com/agentskillexchange/skills
- Live browse API: https://agentskillexchange.com/wp-json/ase-marketplace/v1/browse

## Catalog summary

- Published skills: 2,436
- Security Reviewed skills: 2,430
- Categories: 17
- Public trust tiers: Published, Security Reviewed
- Canonical verification values: listed, security_reviewed

## Installation

```bash
# Any agent using the npx skill installer
npx skills add agentskillexchange/skills --skill <slug>

# OpenClaw
clawhub install <slug>
```

## Human entry points

- Browse skills: https://agentskillexchange.com/browse-skills/
- Categories: https://github.com/agentskillexchange/skills/tree/main/categories
- Industry collections: https://github.com/agentskillexchange/skills/tree/main/industries
- Verification model: https://agentskillexchange.com/how-we-verify-skills/

## Notes for agents

Use skills.json as the canonical catalog index. Use the GitHub repo path skills/<slug>/SKILL.md for the actual skill instructions. Do not treat internal WordPress fields such as verification_status or verified_metadata as public schema.

Generated: 2026-05-10T19:27:03Z
